memories.description: Approached Walter Thompson in the lounge to inquire about the orchestra rehearsal schedule, aiming to ensure everything is perfectly organized for the students.
Clarified to Walter that my inquiry was about the orchestra rehearsal schedule, emphasizing the importance of perfect harmony for the students' performance.
Waiting silently for Walter's response about the orchestra rehearsal schedule, ready to take further action if necessary.
Heard a loud gunshot indicating an active shooter in the building. Decided to move quickly to hide_spot_19 for safety.
Reached hiding spot 19 and decided to stay still and silent to avoid detection from the active shooter.
